name: Cong "Joe" Vu
role: Middle Full-Stack Developer
bio: Full-Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience in building scalable web and mobile apps using React and Node.js. Skilled in optimizing UX and working with cross-functional teams.
about:
Hello, my name is Cong, but you can call me Joe.
I started as a mobile developer with React Native, then expanded to building and maintaining systems from scratch using React and Node.js, adding experience in blockchain projects and smart contract integration.

companies.description: Collaborated with clients in Vietnam and the United States to deliver scalable web and mobile applications.
job: Developed smart contract-based purchase systems using Solidity, leading to the successful deployment of 3+ projects.
Created responsive and visually appealing landing pages from Figma designs, focusing on mobile-first design and aligning closely with client requirements.
Achieved >78% productivity in a remote environment, and participated in 10+ projects.
Provided client support to ensure system reliability and timely issue resolution, quickly addressing concerns.
Authored technical documentation, researched Azure APIs, and implemented CI/CD pipelines on Azure, improving deployment efficiency and system reliability.

companies.description: Collaborated with clients across Sweden, India, and Europe to deliver innovative web and mobile solutions.
job: Developed and maintained a mobile app for teachers to manage students and classes and a CMS for employee and session management, with 15+ teachers actively using the apps.
Built real-time web and mobile apps in the education sector, enhancing student-teacher interaction, and used for daily team meetings during the development phase.
Conducted code reviews, built foundations for 5+ projects, mentored interns during development, and participated in 10+ projects.
Worked on .NET Core for various backend tasks, contributing to developing 3+ projects before transitioning to Node.js, where I expanded my backend development skills.
Contributed to project success through a six-month onsite partnership with client companies, contributing to 2 major app deployments.

companies.description: Collaborated with Japanese clients to deliver high-quality mobile solutions.
job: Developed a cleaner booking app featuring payment processing, real-time chat, and location-based services with map integration.
Collaborated daily with test and design teams to ensure seamless functionality and optimal user experience.
Gained backend experience by working on a few small tasks, contributing to the backend development alongside the team.

projects.title: Blockchain Project (ICO Token)
role: Smart Contract Integration: Designed and implemented smart contracts for presale token purchases.
Full-Stack Development: Developed a landing page, client dashboard, and admin dashboard using React. Built a Node.js backend server to manage operations, supporting over 4,000 users.
Supported the pre-sale process, helping the platform raise over $300,000 in funds.
description: Built a platform to facilitate token pre-sales, integrating blockchain technology and third-party services for efficient and user-friendly digital asset management.
achievements: In this project, I quickly adjusted to the fast pace of blockchain work, making sure smart contracts were well-tested before going live. I provided prompt customer support, helping users with their needs.

projects.title: Fitness Mobile Application

composition.size: 4 members (1 project manager, 1 designer, 1 backend developer, and myself as the frontend developer).

role: Frontend Development: Developed the mobile UI to enhance user experience and engagement.
Backend Integration: Collaborated with the backend team to ensure seamless API integration.
Azure API Research: Researched Azure Portal APIs, authored detailed integration documents for the team, and implemented Azure Pipelines to reduce deployment time.
description: A mobile app designed to deliver personalized workout courses tailored to specific muscle groups.
achievements: Through this project, I learned the importance of being meticulous and following a multi-step process to ensure accuracy and efficiency. I contributed to writing documentation and researching Azure APIs, improving backend processes. Additionally, I implemented Azure Pipelines, which helped reduce deployment time.

projects.title: GrapeSEED Connect
projects.subtitle: Stream Learning Platform
role: Frontend Development: Led the development of the frontend using React Native and Vue, focusing on UI design and real-time video streaming capabilities.
Backend Contribution: Collaborated with the client's backend team to contribute for backend real-time feature.
description: An online platform designed to enhance student-teacher interaction through real-time video streaming, improving the overall online learning experience.
achievements: Through this project, I learned how to work effectively with different teams from different companies, improving collaboration and streamlining workflows.

projects.title: Work Management
projects.subtitle: Projects Management
description: Managed the end-to-end lifecycle of software projects, overseeing team tasks, processes, and ensuring timely deliverables.

composition.size: 3+ members (backend developer, frontend and mobile developers, QA).

role: Project Lifecycle Management: Coordinated team members through all phases of the project lifecycle, including planning, development, and deployment.
Frontend and Mobile Development: Contributed to frontend and mobile development, implementing key features and ensuring smooth UX.
Collaboration: Worked closely with backend developers and QA teams, providing support where necessary to maintain quality and meet deadlines.
achievements: In this project, I learned how to bring together different areas of development, often working on my own to handle tasks across frontend, backend, and QA. I made sure the project was delivered efficiently.

projects.title: Dance School
projects.subtitle: School Management
description: A comprehensive school management system designed to efficiently manage classrooms, students, schedules, and includes reminder functionalities.

composition.size: 4 members (full-stack developer, frontend developers, mobile developers, and QA team).

role: API Development: Covered core functionalities such as user authentication, data management using Entity Framework
Frontend Support: Assisted frontend developers as needed, helping with frontend-related tasks and resolving any issues.

projects.title: Miles At Sea
projects.subtitle: Travel Tracking
description: An application for tracking and logging distance traveled, with rewards earned based on completing quests along the route.
role: Google Maps Integration: Integrated the Google Maps API to enable distance tracking functionality within the application.
Mobile UI Development: Developed and implemented the mobile UI to ensure a functional user experience.

projects.title: Vio Studio
description: A platform aimed at providing students with real-time information about current and upcoming events in their vicinity.

composition.size: 6 members (project manager, designer, two backend developers, and two frontend developers).

role: Frontend Development: Created the frontend web application following Figma designs, ensuring a functional and responsive user experience.
Frontend Management: Managed frontend tasks, including task allocation and progress tracking.

projects.title: Osouji
projects.subtitle: Cleaner booking

composition.size: 7+ members (project manager, designer, two backend developers, two frontend developers, and QA team).

role: Mobile Development: Developed and implemented the mobile UI for the job marketplace application following Figma designs.
Backend Integration: Assisted in a few backend tasks by collaborating with backend developers to ensure basic functionality between the mobile UI and core features.
description: A job marketplace focused on services related to house cleaning and hotels, integrating payment systems and providing directions for seamless transactions.

side-projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS, showcasing my projects and skills. Designed to deliver a smooth user experience on both desktop and mobile devices.
Achieved a Performance score of over 90 on Google PageSpeed Insights.
features: Responsive Design: Optimized for all screen sizes with Tailwind CSS, providing an engaging experience on both desktop and mobile.
Deployed with Vercel: Hosted on Vercel and automatic updates with every Git commit.
side-projects.goal: Create a responsive and visually appealing website to showcase my projects, skills, and experience.

side-projects.title: MEME Network
side-projects.subtitle: Buy $MEME presale token on sepolia testnet
description: A decentralized application (dApp) that combines a React frontend with a smart contract using Solidity, allowing users to interact with the Ethereum blockchain.
features: Smart Contract Development: Created using Hardhat, enabling deployment and testing on the Ethereum network.
Blockchain Interaction: Users can interact with smart contract functions directly from the React frontend.
Wallet Connection: Integrates Rainbow to connect MetaMask for user authentication and transaction handling.
Testnet Support: Allows users to make presale transactions through the Sepolia testnet
side-projects.goal: Develop a full-stack web3 application integrating React with smart contracts using Hardhat and wallet connectivity.

side-projects.title: Docs Clone
side-projects.subtitle: Collaborative Document Editing
description: A real-time collaborative document editing application inspired by Google Docs. Built with Next.js, the app supports user authentication, live collaboration, and seamless document management.
features: Real-Time Collaboration: Live document editing with synchronization powered by Liveblocks.
User Management: Integrates Clerk for secure and user-friendly authentication.
Database Management: Uses Convex to store and manage documents efficiently.
side-projects.goal: Create a document collaboration tool to explore real-time web technologies.

side-projects.title: Finlog
side-projects.subtitle: Expense Logging and Management
description: A personal finance management tool to log expenses and track financial activity. Finlog integrates modern tools to provide a seamless user experience for managing personal finances.
features: Subscription Management: Uses LemonSqueezy for managing user subscriptions.
Banking Integration: Connects with bank accounts using Plaid for real-time financial data.
User Authentication: Secure and smooth user experience powered by Clerk.
Database Management: Implements Drizzle ORM for efficient and scalable data handling.
side-projects.goal: Build a modern personal finance tracking app.
